pr.title: [Non-Record] MLP3x + WD0.04 + OrthoInit + Sliding Eval — 1.4536 BPB

output.summary: Combines 3× MLP width, Muon decoupled weight decay, orthogonal init, and sliding-window eval to keep int8+zlib quant gap minimal while staying <16MB.
techniques: wider FFN multiplier for extra capacity within memory budget
decoupled weight decay plus orthogonal init to regularize quantized weights
sliding-window eval with stride 64 to leverage overlapping context cheaply
